Title: Login with valid standard user
Steps: Enter standard_user; enter secret_sauce; select Login
Expected Result: Inventory page opens and Products heading is visible

Title: Reject invalid credentials
Steps: Enter invalid username and password; select Login
Expected Result: Authentication is rejected and an actionable error is displayed

Title: Reject locked user
Steps: Enter locked_out_user and valid password; select Login
Expected Result: User remains logged out and locked-state message is displayed

Title: Display complete inventory
Expected Result: Six distinct products show name description price and image

Title: Sort products by lowest price
Expected Result: Products are ordered by ascending numeric price

Title: Add one item to cart
Expected Result: Button changes to Remove and cart badge becomes 1

Title: Remove item from inventory page
Steps: Select Remove for the same item
Expected Result: Item is removed and badge count updates

Title: Persist cart across navigation
Steps: Open product detail; return to inventory; open cart
Expected Result: The same item and quantity remain in cart

Title: Validate empty checkout information
Preconditions: Cart contains an item and checkout form is open
Expected Result: Order is not submitted and required-field error is displayed

Title: Complete checkout happy path
Steps: Enter valid customer data; continue; finish
Expected Result: Confirmation page is shown and cart is cleared

Title: Logout ends authenticated session
Preconditions: Authenticated user is on inventory page
Steps: Open menu; select Logout; navigate back
Expected Result: Login page remains protected from authenticated content

Title: Problem user product images
Expected Result: Each product shows its matching image
